meaning: 墨西拿[意大利西西里岛东北岸港市](临墨西拿海峡) ;墨西拿海峡(在意大利半岛南端和西西里岛之间)
examples: Refugees from Messina were relocated to cities throughout Italy.
After that, across the straits of Messina, and it was almost a stroll to Naples; Garibaldi arrived there by train.
Temperatures are set to reach as high as 37 or even 40 degrees in cities like Messina, Pescara and Perugia, well-above the seasonal average.
Ferries between Messina and Villa San Giovanni will be only part of the competition.
Clinton and Messina engaged in a detailed discussion of the politics of swing states.
